purpose: Property-level public-record research prioritization; not individual propensity scoring.

allowed_features.name: verified_parcel
allowed_features.source: Contra Costa County public parcel GIS download
allowed_features.description: Address and APN exist in a current official parcel file.

allowed_features.name: building_permit_count_24m
allowed_features.source: Approved official county/city permit record adapter
allowed_features.description: Count of publicly visible building permits during the previous 24 months.

allowed_features.name: planning_application_count_24m
allowed_features.source: Approved official county/city planning record adapter
allowed_features.description: Count of publicly visible planning applications during the previous 24 months.

allowed_features.name: major_project_type
allowed_features.description: Normalized public project category such as ADU, addition, subdivision, or demolition.

allowed_features.name: market_context_index
allowed_features.source: Licensed or openly licensed aggregate market dataset
allowed_features.description: Market context only; must not encode demographic or protected-class proxies.

prohibited_features: names, phone numbers, emails, social profiles, or household members
income, credit, financial distress, or consumer-report information
demographic, language, religion, family-status, disability, or age data
